displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Banana Leaves  100% Natural. The leaves have a wide range of applications because they are large, flexible, waterproof, and decorative. They are used for cooking and wrapping. The banana leaf has a waxy coating on it, a very subtle flavour of which gets mixed with hot food, thereby increasing its taste. These leaves are also environmentally friendly and can be used in place of plastic disposable plates.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a Cool and Dry Place & Best consumed within 5 days of delivery
